appliedUpdates.description: Pre-existing user-testing.md already contains comprehensive validation guidance; no updates needed

notes.VAL-M1-001: 12/18 Python methods have Go counterparts; 6 Calibre output mode methods correctly excluded by design (convert_to_single_kfx, convert_to_cbz, convert_to_pdf, convert_to_kpf, convert_to_zip_unpack, convert_to_json_content).
notes.VAL-M1-002: 6 fragment organization tests pass: buildBookState fragment summary matches reference, organizeFragments correctly categorizes content, remaps $270 container format, handles $593 last container ID, $262 font count suffix, and $387 with $215 suffix.
notes.VAL-M1-003: go vet clean. Full test suite: only pre-existing TestConvertFileMatchesReferenceStructureIgnoringImages failure (image tiling issue unrelated to M1). All M1-specific tests pass.
notes.VAL-M1-004: M1 changes are documentation-only (yj_book.go comments + doc.go). EPUB output byte-identical to pre-M1 baseline. parity_check.sh shows expected $N vs real name format differences.
